feed.title: Pronounce — recent dictionary additions
feed.subtitle: How engineers actually pronounce project / product / jargon names. Community-maintained.

entry.title: RSA — R S A
entry.summary: RSA is pronounced "R S A" (/ˌɑːr ɛs ˈeɪ/). "R-S-A".

entry.title: AES — A E S
entry.summary: AES is pronounced "A E S" (/ˌeɪ iː ˈɛs/). "A-E-S".

entry.title: SHA — shah
entry.summary: SHA is pronounced "shah" (/ʃɑː/). "shah" or letter-by-letter "S-H-A".

entry.title: TLS — T L S
entry.summary: TLS is pronounced "T L S" (/ˌtiː ɛl ˈɛs/). "T-L-S".

entry.title: PGP — P G P
entry.summary: PGP is pronounced "P G P" (/ˌpiː dʒiː ˈpiː/). "P-G-P".

entry.title: GPG — G P G
entry.summary: GPG is pronounced "G P G" (/ˌdʒiː piː ˈdʒiː/). "G-P-G".

entry.title: WebRTC — web R T C
entry.summary: WebRTC is pronounced "web R T C" (/wɛb ɑːr tiː ˈsiː/). "web-R-T-C".

entry.title: WebGPU — web G P U
entry.summary: WebGPU is pronounced "web G P U" (/wɛb dʒiː piː ˈjuː/). "web-G-P-U".

entry.title: WASI — wah zee
entry.summary: WASI is pronounced "wah zee" (/ˈwɑːzi/). "WAH-zee" — WebAssembly System Interface.

entry.title: IPFS — I P F S
entry.summary: IPFS is pronounced "I P F S" (/ˌaɪ piː ɛf ˈɛs/). "I-P-F-S".

entry.title: Solidity — so lid i tee
entry.summary: Solidity is pronounced "so lid i tee" (/səˈlɪdɪti/). "sol-LID-i-tee".

entry.title: Ethereum — e thee ree um
entry.summary: Ethereum is pronounced "e thee ree um" (/ɪˈθɪriəm/). "e-THEE-ree-um".

entry.title: Fleet — fleet
entry.summary: Fleet is pronounced "fleet" (/fliːt/). "fleet".

entry.title: Lapce — lapss
entry.summary: Lapce is pronounced "lapss" (/læps/). "LAPSS" — Rust editor.

entry.title: Sublime — sub lime
entry.summary: Sublime is pronounced "sub lime" (/səˈblaɪm/). "sub-LIME".

entry.title: VSCode — V S code
entry.summary: VSCode is pronounced "V S code" (/ˌviː ɛs ˈkoʊd/). "V-S-code".

entry.title: Raycast — ray cast
entry.summary: Raycast is pronounced "ray cast" (/ˈreɪˌkæst/). "RAY-cast".

entry.title: Alfred — al fred
entry.summary: Alfred is pronounced "al fred" (/ˈælfrɛd/). "AL-fred".

entry.title: Homebrew — home brew
entry.summary: Homebrew is pronounced "home brew" (/ˈhoʊmˌbruː/). "HOME-brew".

entry.title: Fedora — fuh dora
entry.summary: Fedora is pronounced "fuh dora" (/fəˈdɔːrə/). "fuh-DOR-uh".

entry.title: CentOS — cent O S
entry.summary: CentOS is pronounced "cent O S" (/ˌsɛnt ˈoʊ ɛs/). "cent-O-S".

entry.title: RHEL — rell
entry.summary: RHEL is pronounced "rell" (/rɛl/). "rell" — Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

entry.title: Manjaro — mun jar oh
entry.summary: Manjaro is pronounced "mun jar oh" (/mənˈdʒɑːroʊ/). "mun-JAR-oh".

entry.title: FreeBSD — free B S D
entry.summary: FreeBSD is pronounced "free B S D" (/ˌfriː biː ɛs ˈdiː/). "free-B-S-D".

entry.title: Puppeteer — puppy teer
entry.summary: Puppeteer is pronounced "puppy teer" (/ˌpʌpɪˈtɪər/). "PUP-uh-teer".
